## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing provider names and aliases.
- [ ] I searched existing website/API domains.
- [ ] I searched existing base URLs.
- [ ] I added or updated `data/providers.json`.
- [ ] I ran `npm run validate`.
- [ ] I ran `npm run generate`.
- [ ] The source URL is official provider documentation, an official SDK, or an official example.
